mechanism_narrative: Declining federal funds rates reduce corporate borrowing costs and lower equity discount rates, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 9.0 percent, labor market slack signals severe demand destruction, causing equity valuations to contract over the next month.
failure_condition: Positive 20-day forward returns exceed 55 percent of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in retail sales and housing starts indicate synchronized consumer and capital expenditure recovery, generating positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: Joint positive changes in RSAFS and HOUST yield negative median 60-day returns.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production growth above its 12-month moving average during late-cycle expansions confirms capacity utilization strength, triggering short-term equity momentum.
failure_condition: Signal loses predictive power with Rank IC below 0.01 when VIX exceeds 25.

mechanism_narrative: Rising consumer price index values erode real corporate margins and prompt anticipatory monetary tightening, producing negative forward equity returns.
failure_condition: Positive CPIAUCSL changes correlate with positive 20-day returns in more than 60 percent of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Monthly nonfarm payrolls additions exceeding 200000 confirm robust economic expansion, supporting earnings growth and driving positive quarterly S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: Triggered months show median negative 60-day forward returns.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent GDP contraction and rising inflation signal stagflation, which compresses equity multiples and generates negative monthly returns.
failure_condition: Co-occurring negative GDPC1 growth and positive CPIAUCSL growth yield positive median returns.

mechanism_narrative: At the zero lower bound, further rate cuts are impossible, so equity markets price in forward guidance and liquidity injections, producing positive short-term returns.
failure_condition: Returns are negative in more than 55 percent of observations when FEDFUNDS is below 0.25.
